allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'Redesign Interests, Projects & Skills sections to Apple-level premium UI' --body ' *)
PowerShell($token = \(& git credential fill 2>$null\) | Where-Object { $_ -match "^password=" } | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace "^password=", "" }; if \($token\) { "token found" } else { "no token" })

PowerShell($cred = [System.Net.CredentialCache]::DefaultNetworkCredentials; $wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $wc.Credentials = $cred; try { $result = [System.Net.CredentialCache]::DefaultCredentials; "DefaultCredentials type: " + $result.GetType\(\).Name } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; try { $cm = [Windows.Security.Credentials.PasswordVault,Windows.Security.Credentials,ContentType=WindowsRuntime]::new\(\); $creds = $cm.FindAllByResource\("git:https://github.com"\); foreach\($c in $creds\) { $c.RetrievePassword\(\); "user: " + $c.UserName + " pass_length: " + $c.Password.Length } } catch { "vault error: " + $_.Exception.Message })
